hero.title: Ukutholakala
hero.lead: I-IATF ihlose ukugcina le webhusayithi ilula, ifundeka kalula, ifinyeleleka ngekhibhodi, futhi ihambisana nobuchwepheshe bokusiza.
support: Ukufinyeleleka kwewebhu, i-IATF isebenzisa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Ukufinyeleleka okusebenzayo nakho kuncike kokuhlangenwe nakho okuqondile kwabasebenzisi bezobuchwepheshe bokusiza.

paragraphs: Uma uthola isithiyo sokufinyeleleka kule webhusayithi, sicela ubike nge-imeyili:
items: ubuchwepheshe obusizayo, isiphequluli, noma idivayisi oyisebenzisayo, uma kunesidingo
report.footnote: Akudingeki ukuba ubhale umbiko wesiphazamisi osemthethweni. Incazelo ecacile yanele.

paragraphs: Izinkinga zokufinyeleleka zingafingqwa endaweni yokugcina umphakathi efanele ukuze zilungiswe obala. Imininingwane yokuxhumana yomuntu siqu nolwazi oluyimfihlo olungadingekile luyasuswa ngaphambi kokushicilelwa.
Uma umbiko wakho uhlanganisa ukwaziswa okuyimfihlo, kwenze kucace lokho emyalezweni.
Leli sayithi lincane ngamabomu futhi lincane kakhulu. Ezinye izinguqulo zezilimi zingase zingaphelele ngenkathi izinguqulo zilungiswa.
